title: Hi, I'm Bruno Oliveira.
presentation:
I have been working as a Full-stack Developer since 2021. I primarily work with Angular, Node.js, Firebase, and Elasticsearch, developing scalable, well-structured web applications while applying best coding practices.

With a focus on continuous learning, I have been dedicating myself to studying technologies such as Next.js, GraphQL, and Spring Boot, expanding my technical foundation and understanding of different architectures and ecosystems. I have also gained knowledge in Vue with PostgreSQL and MongoDB, building a solid and diverse foundation to work across a wide variety of environments and stacks.

Check out the Skills section to learn more.
fullstack_description: I participated in the development of several application, both web and mobile, using Angular, Ionic, Node.js, Firebase, Bootstrap, Tailwind, Elasticsearch, and RxJS.
trainee_description: I began my studies developing with Angular, Ionic, Firebase, and Bootstrap, aiming to develop web and mobile applications to a Node.js back-end.
technical_education_type_1: Technical Course in Internet Computing, integrated with high school
